name: range position
hypothesis: Stocks closing near the daily high may show stronger same-day demand.

name: intraday return
hypothesis: Stronger intraday return may carry into the next few days.

name: upper shadow pressure
hypothesis: A large upper shadow can reflect failed intraday strength.

name: lower shadow support
hypothesis: A long lower shadow that closes well can indicate support absorption.

name: daily range
hypothesis: Very large daily range can reflect unstable price discovery and mean reversion.

name: open gap strength
hypothesis: Positive overnight gaps can mark fresh information shocks that keep moving.

name: open gap reversal
hypothesis: Large opening gaps can overreact and mean revert after crowding.

name: volume change 3d
hypothesis: Rising volume over a short window may confirm stronger participation.

name: volume change 5d
hypothesis: A sharp 5-day volume surge can also capture exhaustion and reversal.

name: volume volatility
hypothesis: Unstable turnover often maps to noisier short-term price formation.

name: log volume
hypothesis: Higher traded volume may proxy for easier implementation and broader attention.

name: short vs long volume
hypothesis: A 5-over-20 volume expansion can capture fresh participation.

name: close momentum 3d
hypothesis: Short-horizon momentum can persist in liquid mid-cap names.

name: close momentum 5d
hypothesis: Five-day price continuation may remain visible after neutralization.

name: cross sectional momentum 5d
hypothesis: Cross-sectional ranking can sharpen simple 5-day momentum.

name: time rank momentum
hypothesis: High recent return rank within a stock can capture local breakout state.

name: mean daily return 5d
hypothesis: A smoothed daily return signal may remove some one-day noise.

name: mean daily return 10d
hypothesis: A longer short-term return average may hold if trends are slow-moving.

name: reversal 3d
hypothesis: Three-day winners may partially mean revert after fast moves.

name: reversal 5d
hypothesis: Five-day overextension can mean revert after crowding builds up.

name: daily vol 5d
hypothesis: Higher recent realized volatility can reflect weaker short-term predictability.

name: daily vol 10d
hypothesis: Persistent realized volatility may be penalized after neutralization.

name: range volatility 5d
hypothesis: Expanding range volatility can be a sign of unstable short-term pricing.

name: range mean 5d
hypothesis: Large average daily ranges can precede cooling or reversal.

name: gap mean 5d
hypothesis: Repeated positive overnight gaps can capture sustained information flow.

name: gap volatility 5d
hypothesis: Unstable overnight repricing can reflect noise rather than signal.

name: body over range
hypothesis: A large body relative to full range can proxy for decisive intraday demand.

name: open position in range
hypothesis: Opening already near the daily high can leave less upside room intraday.

name: volume vs 20d mean
hypothesis: Relative turnover spikes can mark stronger attention and liquidity.

name: volume rank minus price rank
hypothesis: Volume strength outrunning price strength may signal unfinished moves.
